title: step size
text: step size Set the size of each step in the Uniface stepped hitlist. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = step size N Arguments N —integer greater than or equal to 0 Description This option can be used to control the size of each step in the Uniface stepped hitlist. If the size is set to zero, the hitlist is disabled. Note: If printing large amounts of data in batch mode with the Clear (C) printing option, it is not advisable to disable the stepped hitlist. Without the stepped hitlist, Uniface would have to select everything before starting to format the print file; the time gained with the C option would be lost. Example: step size Set the hitlist step size to 100: USYS$SYB_PARAMS step size 100 Copy Dsiable the hitlist: USYS$SYB_PARAMS step size 0 Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
